description: Composition:Purple round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with bold chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitHave your cake and eat it too with this tee that invites people to read it and leaves them feeling like a nut. Wear this with jeans and a deadpan face and try not to laugh as you watch people discreetly scan your t-shirt and shy away.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
